name: Arizer Air Max
summary: A pocketable dry-herb vaporiser with a swappable battery for patients who medicate away from home.
description: The Air Max is Arizer's portable ceramic convection vaporiser with a glass vapour path for clean flavour and full temperature control from 50°C to 220°C, by single degrees or in 10-degree steps. The removable, rechargeable 26650 battery means you can carry a spare and keep going all day, with fast USB-C charging and use-while-charging. The pre-loadable glass pod system and 14mm glass connection make it flexible at home or out. It suits patients who want true all-day portability without being tied to a charger. Heat-up takes 60 to 90 seconds, slower than some rivals, but the swappable battery is the trade for it.
